params.name: compartmentId
params.description: The OCID of the compartment. List operations return resources in the compartment and its sub-compartments unless specified otherwise.

params.name: availabilityDomain
params.description: The name of the availability domain (e.g., Uocm:PHX-AD-1). If not specified, returns instances across all availability domains in the compartment.

params.name: displayName
params.description: A filter to return only resources that match the given display name exactly

params.name: lifecycleState
params.description: A filter to return only instances that match the given lifecycle state

params.name: limit
params.description: For list pagination. The maximum number of results per page, or items to return in a paginated list call. The value must be between 1 and 1000.

params.name: page
params.description: For list pagination. The value of the opc-next-page response header from the previous list call.

params.name: sortBy
params.description: The field to sort by

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: The sort order, either ascending or descending

items.docs: Lists the instances in the specified compartment and the specified availability domain. You can filter the results by specifying an instance display name or lifecycle state.

Creates a new instance in the specified compartment and the specified availability domain. For general information about instances, see Overview of the Compute Service. The instance is launched with the specified image, shape, and networking configuration.

params.name: instanceId
params.description: The OCID of the instance

items.docs: Gets information about the specified instance, including its current lifecycle state, shape, image, networking details, and metadata.

params.name: instanceId
params.description: The OCID of the instance

items.docs: Updates certain fields on the specified instance. Fields that are not provided in the request will not be updated. You can update the display name, defined tags, freeform tags, shape, and metadata.

params.name: instanceId
params.description: The OCID of the instance

params.name: preserveBootVolume
params.description: Specifies whether to delete or preserve the boot volume when terminating an instance. Defaults to false (delete the boot volume).

params.name: preserveDataVolumesCreatedAtLaunch
params.description: Specifies whether to delete or preserve data volumes created during launch when terminating an instance. Defaults to true (preserve).

items.docs: Permanently terminates (deletes) the specified instance. Any attached VNICs and volumes are automatically detached when the instance terminates. You can optionally choose to preserve the boot volume associated with the instance.

info.name: Oracle Perform an Action on an Instance

params.name: instanceId
params.description: The OCID of the instance

params.name: action
params.description: The action to perform on the instance

items.docs: Performs an action on the specified instance, such as starting, stopping, resetting, or soft-resetting the instance. The STOP action is equivalent to pressing the power button. The SOFTRESET action gracefully reboots the instance by sending an ACPI shutdown and then powering back on.

params.name: compartmentId
params.description: The OCID of the compartment. List operations return resources in the compartment and its sub-compartments unless specified otherwise.

params.name: availabilityDomain
params.description: The name of the availability domain. If not specified, shapes across all availability domains in the compartment are listed.

params.name: imageId
params.description: The OCID of an image. If specified, only shapes compatible with the image are returned.

params.name: limit
params.description: For list pagination. The maximum number of results per page, or items to return in a paginated list call. The value must be between 1 and 1000.

params.name: page
params.description: For list pagination. The value of the opc-next-page response header from the previous list call.

items.docs: Lists the shapes that can be used to launch an instance within the specified compartment. Shapes determine the number of CPUs, amount of memory, and other resources allocated to an instance. You can filter the list by compatibility with a specific image.

params.name: compartmentId
params.description: The OCID of the compartment. List operations return resources in the compartment and its sub-compartments unless specified otherwise.

params.name: displayName
params.description: A filter to return only resources that match the given display name exactly

params.name: operatingSystem
params.description: The image operating system (e.g., Oracle Linux)

params.name: operatingSystemVersion
params.description: The image operating system version (e.g., 8)

params.name: shape
params.description: Shape name. If specified, only images compatible with the shape are returned.

params.name: lifecycleState
params.description: A filter to return only images that match the given lifecycle state

params.name: sortBy
params.description: The field to sort by

params.name: sortOrder
params.description: The sort order, either ascending or descending

params.name: limit
params.description: For list pagination. The maximum number of results per page, or items to return in a paginated list call. The value must be between 1 and 1000.

params.name: page
params.description: For list pagination. The value of the opc-next-page response header from the previous list call.

items.docs: Lists a subset of images available in the specified compartment, including platform images, custom images, and Marketplace partner images. You can filter the results by display name, operating system, lifecycle state, and shape compatibility.

Creates a boot disk image for the specified instance or imports an image from an Object Storage URL. The image can then be used to launch new instances. When creating from an instance, the instance must be in the STOPPED state.

params.name: imageId
params.description: The OCID of the image

items.docs: Gets the specified image, including its display name, lifecycle state, operating system, and size.

params.name: imageId
params.description: The OCID of the image

items.docs: Updates the display name and tags of the specified image. Avoid entering confidential information.

params.name: imageId
params.description: The OCID of the image

items.docs: Deletes the specified image. Note that platform images provided by Oracle cannot be deleted.

params.name: compartmentId
params.description: The OCID of the compartment. List operations return resources in the compartment and its sub-compartments unless specified otherwise.

params.name: instanceId
params.description: The OCID of the instance to filter by

params.name: availabilityDomain
params.description: The name of the availability domain to filter by

params.name: limit
params.description: For list pagination. The maximum number of results per page, or items to return in a paginated list call. The value must be between 1 and 1000.

params.name: page
params.description: For list pagination. The value of the opc-next-page response header from the previous list call.

items.docs: Lists the VNIC attachments in the specified compartment. A VNIC attachment represents the connection between an instance and a VNIC.

params.name: compartmentId
params.description: The OCID of the compartment. List operations return resources in the compartment and its sub-compartments unless specified otherwise.

params.name: instanceId
params.description: The OCID of the instance to filter by

params.name: volumeId
params.description: The OCID of the volume to filter by

params.name: availabilityDomain
params.description: The name of the availability domain to filter by

params.name: limit
params.description: For list pagination. The maximum number of results per page, or items to return in a paginated list call. The value must be between 1 and 1000.

params.name: page
params.description: For list pagination. The value of the opc-next-page response header from the previous list call.

items.docs: Lists the volume attachments in the specified compartment. You can filter by instance OCID or volume OCID.

params.name: compartmentId
params.description: The OCID of the compartment. List operations return resources in the compartment and its sub-compartments unless specified otherwise.

params.name: instanceId
params.description: The OCID of the instance to filter by

params.name: limit
params.description: For list pagination. The maximum number of results per page, or items to return in a paginated list call. The value must be between 1 and 1000.

params.name: page
params.description: For list pagination. The value of the opc-next-page response header from the previous list call.

items.docs: Lists the console connections for the specified compartment or instance. Console connections enable you to troubleshoot instances by connecting to the serial console or VNC console.
